Class RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.redis.RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder
Enclosing class:
RedisChatMemoryRepository
public static class RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder extends Object
Inner static builder class for constructing instances of RedisChatMemoryRepository.
Author:
Brian Sam-Bodden, Yanming Zhou

  • Method Details

    • jedisClient

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder jedisClient(redis.clients.jedis.RedisClient jedisClient)
      Sets the RedisClient client.
      Parameters:
      jedisClient - the RedisClient client to use
      Returns:
      this builder

    • indexName

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder indexName(String indexName)
      Sets the index name.
      Parameters:
      indexName - the index name to use
      Returns:
      this builder

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder keyPrefix(String keyPrefix)
      Sets the key prefix.
      Parameters:
      keyPrefix - the key prefix to use
      Returns:
      this builder

    • initializeSchema

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - whether to initialize the schema
      Returns:
      this builder

    • ttlSeconds

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder ttlSeconds(long timeToLiveSeconds)
      Sets the time to live in seconds for messages stored in Redis.
      Parameters:
      timeToLiveSeconds - the time to live in seconds (use -1 for no expiration)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • timeToLive

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder timeToLive(Duration timeToLive)
      Sets the time to live duration for messages stored in Redis.
      Parameters:
      timeToLive - the time to live duration (null for no expiration)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • maxConversationIds

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder maxConversationIds(int maxConversationIds)
      Sets the maximum number of conversation IDs to return.
      Parameters:
      maxConversationIds - the maximum number of conversation IDs
      Returns:
      this builder

    • maxMessagesPerConversation

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder maxMessagesPerConversation(int maxMessagesPerConversation)
      Sets the maximum number of messages per conversation to return.
      Parameters:
      maxMessagesPerConversation - the maximum number of messages per conversation
      Returns:
      this builder

    • metadataFields

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository.Builder metadataFields(List<Map<String,String>> metadataFields)
      Sets the metadata field definitions for proper indexing. Format is compatible with RedisVL schema format.
      Parameters:
      metadataFields - list of field definitions
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public RedisChatMemoryRepository build()
      Builds and returns an instance of RedisChatMemoryRepository.
      Returns:
      a new RedisChatMemoryRepository instance
